title: DecisionRecord + LearningRecord — conductor artifact (O-series)
description: The conductor's own artifact and tamper-evident ledger. Every gate verdict is a COMPLETE decision object (O2): a PASS with no rejected options is an un-thought signal. Six-vendor-intersection JSON. The conductor is the single writer (A35). Anchors: O2 complete decision object, O3 min() routing, O4 gate leverage, O5 battery + min-fold, O7 capability ladder, O8 learning record three destinations.

capability_level.description: O7: ships at O-L0 (every gate human-judged); upgrades pre-registered, a serious incident auto-demotes one level

gates.description: O2: one complete decision object per gate crossing. O4: each gate is high-leverage or routine.

artifact_ref.description: pointer to the judged artifact + entries (O1: judge the artifact, not the chat)

leverage.description: O4: high-leverage => independent veto battery; routine => machine checklist, no queued battery

options_rejected.description: O2: empty rejected list = un-thought signal

adjudicator.description: O7: which the capability level allows

routing_hypothesis.description: O3 min(): on failure, which upstream artifact/field is the SMALLEST term (not where it alarmed). Void if a repair there doesn't clear the failure.

acceptance.description: O5: builder's green light is not the end of evidence. effective_verdict = min(re_audit, battery); the written verdict may never exceed battery_verdict.

battery_verdict.description: a 'green but visibly wrong' output is a FAILURE, not a pass

battery_independence_tier.description: O5/A33: high stakes require model-tier (different-vendor attacker); 'none' only when battery_verdict=not_run

battery_stop_reason.description: E9 pre-registered condition that fired; never 'N clean rounds'

final_verdict.description: on loop-budget exhaustion, honest stopped_unmet with named blocking_gaps; never relax a gate to force a pass

learning_record.description: O8: emitted on pipeline close. Three FIXED destinations, each with an actual write (diff-checkable). A long stretch with zero KB weakening = reflux dead.

root_cause_routing_verified.description: O3: did the min() routing hypotheses hold? update the failure-mode->stage map

battery_breaches.description: O5: gaps the battery punched through

kb_revision.description: may weaken/overturn an existing article; long-term none = reflux dead
